_publications._publicationTitle: A Systematic Assessment of Accuracy in Detecting Somatic Mosaic Variants by Deep Amplicon Sequencing: Application to NF2 Gene.

_contextSnippet: we were able to identify 100% of the 46 known variants in samples with dilutions ≥ 5%. On the other hand, detecting events in samples with dilution 0.01 was challenging: we identified only 62%
details: Detected SNVs with 100% sensitivity in samples with dilutions ≥5%, but only 62% sensitivity in samples with 1% dilution. False positives represented ~99% of detected variants
